caption: An older man with gray hair and glasses stands behind a podium, speaking into a black microphone. He wears a blue button-down shirt featuring a colorful eagle motif on the chest and a beaded necklace. He is positioned against a backdrop of brown horizontal blinds. The man looks down at yellow papers on the podium and adjusts them with his hands as he speaks. Throughout the sequence, a white box containing the text "ORCA" remains visible on the right side of the scene. In the final frame, a beige lower-third graphic appears at the bottom of the screen, identifying the man as "Roland Bluto" and "Abenaki Poet". The camera remains in a static medium shot, capturing his slight movements as he reads from his notes.
